calendar.matters:
Petition For Order Modifying Terms Of Trust
Off Calendar Aug-31-2021 Off Calendar

Petition For Order Modifying Terms Of Trust
Off Calendar Jun-22-2021 Continued To Aug-31-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Yulissa Zulaica and Anna Michnickak, via ZOOM, for Muriel Fox, John Fox III, and Jeffrey Fox, Petitioners.

At the outset, the court advises counsel of notice issues to the beneficiaries. Ms. Zulaica reports that the charities have been notified but that the Examiner notes she received were somewhat unclear to her and she is ready to comply with any request from the court. Discussion between the court and counsel continues regarding the estimated current value of the trust; the court's concern regarding the theoretical nature of the request in the petition; providing notice to the San Francisco SPCA and the possible conflict of interest caused by Muriel Fox not being separately represented from trustees John Fox III and Jeffrey Fox.

After additional discussion, the Petition to Modify Terms of Trust is continued to August 31, 2021, at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: R. Neves. Not reported.

Petition For Order Modifying Terms Of Trust
Off Calendar May-18-2021 Continued To Jun-22-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petitioners Ex Parte Application To Advance Hearing Date Re Petition For Order Modifying Terms Of Trust; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities In Support Thereof
Off Calendar Mar-23-2021 Denied
